scripts.check:trakt: npm run format:check && npm run build:trakt && node --check scripts/vendor/Env.js && node --check scripts/vendor/Env.module.mjs && node --check trakt_simplified_chinese/src/main.mjs && node --check trakt_simplified_chinese/src/main-clear-cache.mjs && node --check trakt_simplified_chinese/src/main-expand-cache.mjs && node --check trakt_simplified_chinese/src/utils/common.mjs && node --check trakt_simplified_chinese/trakt_simplified_chinese.js && node --check trakt_simplified_chinese/trakt_simplified_chinese_clear_cache.js && node --check trakt_simplified_chinese/trakt_simplified_chinese_expand_cache.js
scripts.test: npm run build:trakt && node --test tests/trakt_argument.test.mjs tests/trakt_cache_utils.test.mjs tests/trakt_module_manifest.test.mjs tests/trakt_script_watchnow.test.mjs tests/trakt_script_translations.test.mjs tests/trakt_script_people.test.mjs tests/trakt_script_routes.test.mjs
